2605.19743.title: EngiAI: A Multi-Agent Framework and Benchmark Suite for LLM-Driven Engineering Design
2605.19743.paper_summary: Large Language Model (LLM) agents are increasingly applied to engineering design tasks, yet existing evaluation frameworks do not adequately address multi-agent systems that combine simulation, retrieval, and manufacturing preparation. We introduce a benchmark suite with three evaluation dimensions: (1) a workflow benchmark with seven prompt styles targeting distinct cognitive demands-including direct tool use, semantic disambiguation, conditional branching, and working-memory tasks; (2) a Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) benchmark with gated scoring isolating retrieval contributions to parameter selection; and (3) an High Performance Computing (HPC) benchmark evaluating end-to-end ML training orchestration on a SLURM cluster. Alongside the benchmark we present EngiAI, a Multi-Agent System (MAS) reference implementation built on LangGraph that operationalizes the benchmark by coordinating seven specialized agents through a supervisor architecture, unifying topology optimization, document retrieval, HPC job orchestration, and 3D printer control. Across four LLM backends and two EngiBench problems, proprietary models achieve 96-97% average task completion on Beams2D, while open-source 4B-parameter models reach 55-78%, with clear generational improvement. Conditional branching proves most challenging, with task completion dropping to 20-53% for the conditional style on Photonics2D. RAG gating confirms near-perfect retrieval-augmented scores ($\approx 1.0$) versus near-zero without retrieval, validating the evaluation design. On HPC orchestration, one model completes all pipeline steps in 100% of runs while another drops to 50%, revealing that multi-step instruction following degrades over long-running workflows.
2605.19743.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLM）代理越來越多地應用於工程設計任務，然而現有的評估框架並未充分考慮結合模擬、檢索和製造準備的多代理系統。我們引入了一個基準套件，包含三個評估維度：（1）一個工作流程基準，具有七種針對不同認知需求的提示風格，包括直接工具使用、語義消歧、條件分支和工作記憶任務；（2）一個檢索增強生成（RAG）基準，通過門控評分隔離檢索對參數選擇的貢獻；以及（3）一個高性能計算（HPC）基準，評估在SLURM集群上的端到端機器學習訓練協調。除了基準外，我們還展示了EngiAI，一個基於LangGraph的多代理系統（MAS）參考實現，通過一個監督架構協調七個專門代理，實現基準的操作，統一拓撲優化、文檔檢索、HPC作業協調和3D打印機控制。在四個LLM後端和兩個EngiBench問題中，專有模型在Beams2D上的平均任務完成率達到96-97%，而開源的4B參數模型達到55-78%，顯示出明顯的代際改進。條件分支被證明是最具挑戰性的，條件風格在Photonics2D上的任務完成率下降至20-53%。RAG門控確認了接近完美的檢索增強分數（$\approx 1.0$），而在沒有檢索的情況下則接近零，驗證了評估設計。在HPC協調方面，一個模型在100%的運行中完成所有管道步驟，而另一個則下降至50%，顯示多步指令跟隨在長時間運行的工作流程中會退化。
2605.19743.author: Gioele Molinari et.al.
2605.19743.authors: Gioele Molinari, Florian Felten, Soheyl Massoudi, Mark Fuge
